message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.assign (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.assign:

- assign_new_column: 2-col frame + assign new column "c" -> 3 cols
- assign_overwrite_column: 2-col frame, overwrite "a" with new
  values (verifies in-place semantics on existing column name)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.assign(**{name: values})), runs the Rust DataFrame.assign(
vec![(name, Column)]), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameAssign was already wired through
the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-x70er]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
